div.div:
B.2 Severity Decision Tree
LLM classification
Critical: no auth, no isolation,
lethal trifecta, irreversible arch
High: auth bypass, insecure creds,
cluster RBAC, vulnerable upstream
Medium: real concern, below High
NFR Gap: missing spec, not flaw
